regional_cost_note: Solar panel installers in Hastings typically quote $12,500–$17,000 for a 5kW system installed, and $21,000–$30,000 for a 10kW system. Battery storage adds $8,500–$15,000. Hawke's Bay rates typically run 5–10% below the national average. Compare quotes carefully — system size, panel brand, inverter quality, and export metering arrangements all affect the total cost and payback period.
